meta.note: Fixed rules, moving outputs. Update slow variables deliberately; update fast variables daily after close. Pre-execution shock review is optional and report-only. Family interpolation is display-only and does not alter final execution bias. Added quarterly EPS accumulation review without auto-replacing active_eps_base.

dividend_drag.note: Display-price sensitivity only. Use 'heavy' if you want to approximate the earlier pessimistic net-price style.

slow_variable_review.eps_base_note: Active EPS base is a slow-moving valuation anchor. Revise only when earnings basis / model basis changes materially.

suggested_eps_meta.note: Auto-filled from collected quarterly EPS; display-only and never auto-applied.

tsmc_weight_meta.note: TSMC weight is a structural observation; daily auto-refresh is unnecessary.

slow_variable_review.quarterly_eps_tracker_note: Quarterly EPS collection is used to derive a candidate annual EPS. Candidate is display-only and does not auto-replace active_eps_base.

family_interpolation.note: Display-only. Single-axis dense interpolation within fixed assumption families. This section improves valuation readability but does not alter execution bias.

current_price_position.note: rough classification only; sparse scenario set and mixed 1Y/2Y horizons => low decision value

family_interpolation.note: Display-only. Single-axis dense interpolation within fixed assumption families. This section improves valuation readability but does not alter execution bias.

combined.action_instruction: 觀察為主；等待更好對齊，且留意 DQ。

how_to_read.layer_1: Use valuation scenarios to decide whether the current zone is cheap / fair / expensive.
how_to_read.layer_1b: Use family interpolation summary to improve valuation readability; this section is display-only.
how_to_read.layer_2: Use BB/regime/tranche references to decide whether to act now or wait.
how_to_read.layer_3: Use pre-execution review to override action bias when TX night close breaches roll25 bands.
how_to_read.zone_note: valuation zone is rough classification only; do not over-interpret sparse or mixed-horizon percentile output.
how_to_read.family_note: family interpolation is display-only and does not alter final execution bias.
how_to_read.family_boundary_note: percentile=0 or 100 can simply mean the target is below family min or above family max.
how_to_read.family_robustness_note: 2027_defensive_family is a robustness check only; it does not alter execution bias.
how_to_read.slow_var_note: suggested_eps_base is display-only and never auto-applied; tsmc_weight_meta is informative only.
how_to_read.quarterly_eps_note: annual_eps_candidate is derived from complete fiscal year quarters only; it does not auto-replace active_eps_base.
how_to_read.dq_note: DQ flags can downgrade or veto action bias even when valuation or regime otherwise look acceptable.
how_to_read.shock_note: Pre-execution review is optional. If no roll25 report or TX night close is provided, no shock override is applied.
how_to_read.note: Rules fixed, outputs dynamic. Fast variables update daily; slow assumptions should be revised deliberately.
